title: Classic Truffle Pasta
description: A rich, creamy, and earthy delight that is surprisingly simple to make. Perfect for a cozy dinner.

steps.title: Boil Pasta
steps.instruction: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook until al dente according to package instructions. Reserve 1/2 cup of pasta water before draining.

steps.title: Sauté Garlic
steps.instruction: In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.

steps.title: Make the Sauce
steps.instruction: Reduce heat to low. Stir in the heavy cream and let it simmer for 2 minutes. Gradually whisk in the Parmesan cheese until the sauce is smooth.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to coat. If the sauce is too thick, add a splash of the reserved pasta water.

steps.title: Add Truffle Flavor
steps.instruction: Remove from heat and drizzle with truffle oil. Toss well. Garnish with extra Parmesan and cracked black pepper before serving.

title: Dal Makhani
description: A classic North Indian dish made with whole black lentils and red kidney beans, slow-cooked with butter and cream.

steps.title: Soak Lentils
steps.description: Wash and soak the black lentils and kidney beans overnight in plenty of water.

steps.title: Pressure Cook
steps.description: Pressure cook the soaked lentils and rajma with water and salt for 15-20 whistles on low heat until completely soft and easily mashable.

steps.title: Prepare Masala
steps.description: In a heavy bottom pan, heat butter, add ginger-garlic paste and cook for a minute. Add tomato puree and red chili powder, cook until butter separates.

steps.title: Slow Cook
steps.description: Add the cooked dal along with its water to the masala. Mix well and let it simmer on low heat for at least 30-40 minutes. Add cream just before serving.

faqs.question: Can I skip cream?
faqs.answer: Yes, but cream gives it the authentic restaurant-style richness.

title: Paneer Butter Masala
description: A rich, creamy, and mildly sweet restaurant-style North Indian paneer curry.

steps.title: Prepare Gravy Base
steps.description: Sauté chopped onions, tomatoes, ginger, garlic, and cashews in a little butter until soft. Let it cool and blend into a smooth puree.

steps.title: Cook the Puree
steps.description: Melt remaining butter in a kadhai. Add the blended puree and cook on medium flame until oil starts separating from the sides.

steps.title: Add Spices & Cream
steps.description: Stir in red chili powder, salt, and heavy cream. Mix well and let it simmer for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add Paneer
steps.description: Gently add cubed paneer pieces. Simmer for 3-4 minutes. Sprinkle crushed kasuri methi on top. Serve hot.

faqs.question: Can I use tofu instead of paneer?
faqs.answer: Yes, firm tofu can be used as a vegan alternative.

title: Shahi Paneer
description: Royal North Indian curry prepared with paneer in a thick, fragrant gravy of almonds, cashews, and yogurt.

steps.title: Prepare White Paste
steps.description: Boil cashews, almonds, and onion paste together. Blend into a rich, fine paste.

steps.title: Simmer Gravy
steps.description: Sauté the white paste in ghee. Lower heat, add whisked yogurt, cardamom powder, and saffron-infused milk. Stir constantly.

steps.title: Add Paneer
steps.description: Gently add paneer cubes to the simmering gravy. Season with salt and a touch of sugar. Let it cook for 5 minutes on low heat.

faqs.question: Why cardamoms?
faqs.answer: Cardamom gives the royal aromatic scent characteristic of Shahi Paneer.

title: Kadai Paneer
description: Spicy and vibrant paneer dish cooked with freshly ground kadai spices, onions, and bell peppers.

steps.title: Make Kadai Masala
steps.description: Dry roast coriander seeds and dry red chilies. Grind coarsely to form fresh Kadai Masala.

steps.title: Sauté Veggies
steps.description: Sauté cubed onions and bell peppers in a kadai with some oil until slightly tender. Set aside.

steps.title: Assemble Dish
steps.description: In the same kadai, cook onion-tomato paste, add kadai masala, sautéed veggies, paneer cubes, and water. Simmer for 5 minutes.

title: Palak Paneer
description: Classic healthy paneer dish simmered in a smooth, spiced spinach gravy.

steps.title: Blanch Spinach
steps.description: Boil spinach for 2 minutes. Shock in ice water to maintain bright green color. Blend with green chilies.

steps.title: Cook Gravy
steps.description: Sauté ginger-garlic paste and onions. Add the spinach puree, garam masala, and salt. Simmer on low heat.

steps.title: Add Paneer & Cream
steps.description: Add paneer cubes (raw or pan-fried) and cook for 3 minutes. Finish with heavy cream.

faqs.question: Why shock spinach in ice water?
faqs.answer: This preserves the natural bright green color of chlorophyll.

title: Matar Paneer
description: Simple home-style Punjabi curry made with green peas and paneer cubes in a spiced tomato gravy.

steps.title: Sauté Base
steps.description: Cook onions, ginger, and garlic paste, then add tomato puree and spices until oil separates.

steps.title: Simmer Peas
steps.description: Add peas and a cup of water. Simmer until peas are soft and cooked.

steps.title: Combine Paneer
steps.description: Add paneer cubes. Simmer for 4-5 minutes, garnish with coriander leaves, and serve warm.

title: Paneer Tikka
description: Marinated paneer skewers baked or grilled with onions and bell peppers in a tandoori masala blend.

steps.title: Marinate
steps.description: Mix yogurt, besan, chili powder, ginger-garlic paste, and lemon juice. Coat paneer, onions, and pepper cubes. Marinate for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Skewer
steps.description: Thread marinated paneer and veggies alternately onto skewers.

steps.title: Grill
steps.description: Grill on a hot pan or bake in oven at 200°C for 12-15 minutes until charred at edges. Serve with green chutney.

title: Chilli Paneer
description: Popular Indo-Chinese appetizer made with crispy batter-coated paneer tossed in sweet, sour, and spicy chilli sauce.

steps.title: Fry Paneer
steps.description: Coat paneer in cornflour-maida batter. Deep or shallow fry until crispy golden-brown.

steps.title: Make Chilli Sauce
steps.description: Sauté garlic, green chilies, and onions. Add capsicum, soy sauce, chilli sauce, vinegar, and cornflour slurry.

steps.title: Toss
steps.description: Add fried paneer cubes to the bubbling sauce and toss on high heat. Garnish with spring onions.

title: Malai Kofta
description: Crispy paneer-potato dumplings (koftas) served in a rich, creamy onion-tomato cashew gravy.

steps.title: Prepare Koftas
steps.description: Mash paneer and potatoes. Stuff with chopped cashews and raisins, shape into balls, coat with cornstarch, and deep fry until golden.

steps.title: Prepare Rich Gravy
steps.description: Sauté spices and onion-tomato paste. Blend with soaked cashews. Simmer until smooth, then stir in cream.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Place hot koftas in a serving dish, pour rich gravy on top just before serving, and garnish with fresh cream.

faqs.question: Why pour gravy just before serving?
faqs.answer: Koftas are very delicate and will turn soggy or break if kept in the gravy for too long.

title: Restaurant Style Dal Tadka
description: Yellow lentils cooked with turmeric and salt, then tempered with a spicy ghee-aromatic tadka.

steps.title: Boil Lentils
steps.description: Pressure cook rinsed yellow lentils with water, salt, and turmeric for 3 whistles.

steps.title: Prepare Masala
steps.description: Sauté onions, ginger, garlic, and tomatoes until soft. Mix in cooked dal.

steps.title: Add Tadka
steps.description: In a tadka pan, heat ghee, splutter cumin/mustard seeds, add red dried chilies and chilli powder, and pour sizzling over the dal.

title: Aloo Gobi
description: Classic dry Indian curry made with potatoes and cauliflower florets sautéed with spices.

steps.title: Sauté Spices
steps.description: Heat oil, add cumin seeds, chopped ginger, and turmeric powder.

steps.title: Cook Veggies
steps.description: Add cut potatoes and cauliflower. Toss with salt, cover and cook on low heat until tender.

steps.title: Garnish
steps.description: Uncover, sauté on high for 2 minutes for slight crispiness, add garam masala and coriander, then serve.

title: Jeera Aloo
description: Super simple and quick dry potato recipe tossed with cumin seeds and mild spices.

steps.title: Temper Jeera
steps.description: Heat oil, add cumin seeds. Let them turn golden-brown and splutter.

steps.title: Add Potatoes
steps.description: Add boiled potatoes, turmeric, salt, amchur (dry mango powder), and red chili powder. Toss well.

steps.title: Cook & Serve
steps.description: Sauté on medium flame for 5 minutes until crispy. Serve hot with Puris or Parathas.

title: Kashmiri Dum Aloo
description: Baby potatoes deep-fried and slow-cooked in a spicy curd-based gravy infused with fennel and ginger.

steps.title: Fry Potatoes
steps.description: Boil baby potatoes until parboiled. Prick all over with a toothpick and deep fry until crispy golden.

steps.title: Simmer Gravy
steps.description: Whisk curd with spices. Add to hot pan, stir constantly to prevent curdling. Add fried potatoes.

steps.title: Dum Cook
steps.description: Seal the pot with dough or a tight lid. Simmer on low heat for 15 minutes to infuse flavors.

title: Bhindi Masala
description: Okra (ladyfinger) stir-fried with onions, tomatoes, and everyday spices.

steps.title: Dry Fry Bhindi
steps.description: Sauté sliced bhindi with 1 tsp oil on medium heat until non-sticky. Remove and set aside.

steps.title: Cook Masala
steps.description: Sauté onions and ginger-garlic paste. Add tomatoes and dry spices. Cook until oil separates.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Add cooked bhindi and amchur. Toss gently and cook for 5 minutes uncovered. Serve hot.

faqs.question: How to prevent bhindi from turning sticky?
faqs.answer: Dry the washed bhindi completely before cutting, and never cover the pan while frying.

title: Baingan Bharta
description: Smoky fire-roasted eggplant mashed and cooked with onions, tomatoes, ginger, and spices.

steps.title: Roast Eggplant
steps.description: Oil the eggplant and roast directly over a gas flame until skin is completely charred and inner pulp is soft.

steps.title: Peel & Mash
steps.description: Let eggplant cool. Peel charred skin, wash lightly, and mash the pulp thoroughly.

steps.title: Sauté
steps.description: Sauté onions, ginger, garlic, and tomatoes. Add mashed pulp and spices. Cook on medium-low for 10 minutes.

title: Mix Veg Sabzi
description: Dry restaurant-style curry containing mixed vegetables like carrots, beans, peas, and cauliflower.

steps.title: Parboil Veggies
steps.description: Parboil hard veggies like carrots, beans, and cauliflower in salted water. Drain.

steps.title: Sauté Masala
steps.description: Cook cumin, onions, ginger-garlic paste, and tomato puree until rich and thick.

steps.title: Combine & Steam
steps.description: Add veggies, spices, and paneer. Cover and steam for 8-10 minutes on low heat.

title: Veg Kolhapuri
description: Vibrant and super spicy mixed vegetable curry hailing from Kolhapur, Maharashtra.

steps.title: Make Kolhapuri Masala
steps.description: Dry roast dry coconut, sesame seeds, poppy seeds, and red dry chilies. Grind into a fine spice paste.

steps.title: Sauté Vegetables
steps.description: Sauté mixed veggies in oil until 80% cooked.

steps.title: Cook Gravy
steps.description: Cook tomato puree, add Kolhapuri spice paste, veggies, water, and salt. Simmer for 8-10 minutes.

faqs.question: Is it very spicy?
faqs.answer: Yes, authentic Veg Kolhapuri is known for its high spice level. Reduce red chilies if needed.

title: Veg Jalfrezi
description: Semi-dry tangy curry containing stir-fried veggies cooked in tomato paste and vinegar.

steps.title: Sauté Aromatics
steps.description: Sauté ginger-garlic paste and cumin seeds in oil on high heat.

steps.title: Stir Fry Veggies
steps.description: Add sliced vegetables. Stir fry for 4 minutes on high heat to keep them crispy.

steps.title: Sauce & Toss
steps.description: Add tomato paste, ketchup, red pepper flakes, salt, and vinegar. Toss well and cook dry for 2 minutes.

title: Lauki Ki Sabzi
description: Simple, light, and healthy everyday bottle gourd curry cooked with minimal spices.

steps.title: Sauté Spices
steps.description: Heat oil or ghee, add cumin seeds, green chili, and ginger. Sauté chopped tomato.

steps.title: Pressure Cook
steps.description: Add diced lauki, salt, and turmeric. Cover cooker and cook for 2 whistles (no water needed as lauki releases water).

steps.title: Mash & Serve
steps.description: Open cover, mash some lauki pieces lightly with a ladle for a thicker consistency, simmer for 1 minute, and serve.

title: Tinda Masala Sabzi
description: Apple gourd (tinda) cooked in a homestyle onion-tomato gravy with basic spices.

steps.title: Sauté Base
steps.description: Sauté chopped onions and tomatoes with cumin seeds until soft.

steps.title: Add Tinda
steps.description: Add peeled and chopped tinda pieces, salt, turmeric, and coriander powder. Mix well.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.description: Add 1/4 cup water, cover the pot, and cook on low heat for 12-15 minutes until soft. Garnish with coriander leaves.

title: Hyderabadi Veg Biryani
description: Aromatic basmati rice cooked layered with spiced mixed vegetables, saffron, and fresh herbs in dum style.

steps.title: Boil Rice
steps.description: Boil basmati rice with whole spices (bay leaf, cloves, cardamom) until 70% cooked. Drain and set aside.

steps.title: Prepare Vegetable Gravy
steps.description: Marinate veggies in yogurt, biryani masala, mint, coriander, and salt. Cook in a pot until tender.

steps.title: Layer & Dum Cook
steps.description: In a heavy pot, layer cooked veggies, followed by the 70% cooked rice. Sprinkle fried onions, mint, and saffron milk. Seal with foil, cover, and dum cook on low flame for 20 minutes.

faqs.question: How to make perfect birista (fried onions)?
faqs.answer: Slice onions thin and fry them in hot oil on medium flame until golden brown and crispy.

title: Veg Pulao
description: One-pot spiced pilaf cooked with long grain rice, mixed vegetables, and simple spices.

steps.title: Sauté Aromatics
steps.description: Sauté sliced onions and whole spices in ghee or oil until golden.

steps.title: Add Rice & Veggies
steps.description: Add mixed vegetables, soaked basmati rice, salt, and 2 cups of water. Stir gently.

steps.title: Cook
steps.description: If using a pressure cooker, cook for 2 whistles. If using a pot, cover and cook on low heat until water is absorbed.

title: Jeera Rice
description: Fluffy basmati rice tempered with cumin seeds and aromatic whole spices.

steps.title: Soak Rice
steps.description: Rinse and soak Basmati rice in water for 20 minutes. Drain.

steps.title: Temper Jeera
steps.description: Heat ghee in a pot, add cumin seeds, cardamoms, and cloves. Cook until cumin splutters.

steps.title: Cook Rice
steps.description: Add rice, sauté gently for 1 minute, add water and salt. Cover and simmer on low for 12 minutes.

title: Veg Fried Rice
description: Indo-Chinese recipe of stir-fried pre-cooked rice with chopped vegetables and soy sauce.

steps.title: Sauté Aromatics
steps.description: Sauté chopped garlic and spring onions in oil on very high heat for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Stir Fry Veggies
steps.description: Add chopped vegetables and cook on high heat for 2 minutes until slightly cooked but still crispy.

steps.title: Add Rice & Sauce
steps.description: Add cold pre-cooked rice, soy sauce, vinegar, black pepper, and salt. Toss vigorously on high heat for 2 minutes.

faqs.question: Why use cold rice?
faqs.answer: Cold, slightly dry rice grains don't clump or break apart when stir-fried.

title: South Indian Lemon Rice
description: Tangy and nutty rice tempered with mustard seeds, curry leaves, peanuts, and fresh lemon juice.

steps.title: Fry Peanuts
steps.description: Heat oil, fry peanuts until golden-brown. Set aside.

steps.title: Make Tempering
steps.description: In the same oil, add mustard seeds, urad dal, dried red chilies, turmeric, curry leaves, and green chili. Sauté briefly.

steps.title: Mix Rice & Lemon
steps.description: Turn off heat. Add cooked rice, fried peanuts, lemon juice, and salt. Mix thoroughly.

title: Curd Rice
description: Classic soothing South Indian recipe of soft cooked rice mashed with yogurt and seasoned with spices.

steps.title: Mash Rice
steps.description: Mash hot overcooked rice slightly with a spoon. Let it cool.

steps.title: Add Yogurt
steps.description: Add whisked yogurt, a splash of milk (optional, to prevent souring), and salt to the cooled rice. Mix well.

steps.title: Tempering
steps.description: Heat oil, add mustard seeds, urad dal, ginger, green chilies, and curry leaves. Pour over curd rice. Mix and serve chilled.

faqs.question: Why add milk?
faqs.answer: Milk cuts down the acidity of yogurt, keeping the curd rice fresh and non-sour for longer.

title: Coconut Rice
description: South Indian style rice dish prepared by cooking basmati rice with freshly grated coconut and tempered spices.

steps.title: Temper Cashews & Spices
steps.description: Heat coconut oil, splutter mustard seeds, sauté urad dal, red chilies, curry leaves, and cashews until golden.

steps.title: Roast Coconut
steps.description: Add grated coconut and sauté on low heat for 2 minutes until fragrant but without changing color.

steps.title: Add Rice
steps.description: Add cooked rice and salt. Mix gently and heat through for 2 minutes.

title: Tomato Rice (Thakkali Sadam)
description: Spicy and tangy South Indian style tomato pilaf seasoned with garlic and whole spices.

steps.title: Sauté Veggies
steps.description: Sauté onions, ginger, and garlic paste in oil. Add chopped tomatoes, sambar powder, and turmeric. Cook until tomatoes are mushy.

steps.title: Cook Tomatoes
steps.description: Let the tomato mixture cook until oil starts separating from the sides.

steps.title: Combine Rice
steps.description: Mix in the cooked rice and salt gently. Cover and cook on low heat for 3-4 minutes to blend flavors.

title: Moong Dal Khichdi
description: Comforting, wholesome one-pot meal prepared with rice, split green gram (moong dal), and mild spices.

steps.title: Rinse & Mix
steps.description: Rinse rice and moong dal together. Soak in water for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Sauté
steps.description: Heat ghee in a pressure cooker. Add cumin seeds, hing (asafoetida), and turmeric. Sauté briefly.

steps.title: Cook
steps.description: Add rice, dal, salt, and 3.5 cups of water. Pressure cook for 3-4 whistles until very soft and mushy. Serve with ghee.

faqs.question: Is khichdi good during illness?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is extremely easy to digest, nutritious, and comforting.

title: Masala Rice
description: A spicy, delicious way to use leftover rice by stir-frying it with onions, tomatoes, and garam masala.

steps.title: Sauté Onion-Tomato
steps.description: Sauté cumin, chopped onions, and ginger paste, then add tomatoes and cook until soft.

steps.title: Add Masalas
steps.description: Add red chili powder, turmeric, salt, garam masala, and pav bhaji masala. Cook for 1 minute.

steps.title: Toss Rice
steps.description: Add leftover rice. Mix gently to coat, cook for 3 minutes, add lemon juice, and serve.

title: Indori Kanda Poha
description: Fluffy flattened rice roasted with mustard seeds, green chilies, onions, potatoes, and peanuts.

steps.title: Rinse Poha
steps.description: Rinse poha in a colander under running water. Drain completely. Sprinkle salt, turmeric, and 1 tsp sugar. Toss lightly and set aside.

steps.title: Fry Aromatics
steps.description: Heat oil, fry peanuts until crunchy. Add mustard seeds, green chilies, curry leaves, and chopped onions. Sauté until onions are translucent.

steps.title: Steam Poha
steps.description: Add poha to the pan. Toss gently, cover, and steam on very low heat for 3-4 minutes. Serve with lemon and sev.

faqs.question: Why is my poha mushy?
faqs.answer: You might have soaked the poha too long. Rinsing quickly is enough to soften it.

title: Suji Upma
description: Savory South Indian breakfast pudding made from roasted semolina cooked with vegetables and spices.

steps.title: Roast Suji
steps.description: Dry roast semolina on low flame until it turns slightly fragrant. Set aside.

steps.title: Sauté Aromatics
steps.description: Heat oil, add mustard seeds, urad dal, cashew pieces, ginger, green chili, and curry leaves. Sauté onions and veggies.

steps.title: Boil & Pour suji
steps.description: Add 2.5 cups of water and salt. Bring to a boil. Pour in the roasted semolina slowly, stirring continuously to avoid lumps. Simmer covered for 3 minutes until thick.

title: Punjabi Aloo Paratha
description: Whole wheat flatbread stuffed with a spicy, delicious mashed potato filling.

steps.title: Knead Dough
steps.description: Knead wheat flour with water and salt into a soft, smooth dough. Rest for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Prepare Stuffing
steps.description: Mix mashed potatoes with green chilies, coriander, red chili powder, garam masala, amchur, and salt.

steps.title: Roll & Roast
steps.description: Pinch a dough ball, flatten slightly, place stuffing in center, pinch borders to seal. Roll gently. Roast on a hot tawa using ghee until golden brown spots appear on both sides.

faqs.question: How to prevent paratha from breaking?
faqs.answer: Make sure the potato stuffing is fully cool and completely lump-free.

title: Paneer Paratha
description: Delectable whole wheat flatbread stuffed with spiced grated paneer and herbs.

steps.title: Knead Dough
steps.description: Knead dough as usual and divide into medium balls.

steps.title: Prepare Paneer Filling
steps.description: Combine grated paneer, red chili powder, chopped green chilies, coriander, kasuri methi, and salt.

steps.title: Stuff & Cook
steps.description: Roll dough, stuff with paneer filling, seal and roll. Cook on hot tawa applying ghee until crisp.

title: Gobhi Paratha
description: Punjabi breakfast flatbread stuffed with finely grated spiced cauliflower.

steps.title: Squeeze Gobhi
steps.description: Grate cauliflower. Mix with a little salt, let stand for 5 minutes, then squeeze tightly in a cloth to remove excess moisture.

steps.title: Add Spices
steps.description: Mix dry cauliflower with carom seeds, ginger, green chilies, chili powder, and coriander.

steps.title: Stuff & Fry
steps.description: Stuff into wheat dough, roll carefully, and fry on griddle with butter or ghee until golden brown.

faqs.question: Why squeeze gobhi?
faqs.answer: Cauliflower releases moisture, which will make the dough soggy and tear the paratha during rolling.

title: Mooli Paratha
description: Nutritious whole wheat paratha stuffed with grated spiced white radish.

steps.title: Squeeze Mooli
steps.description: Grate radish. Squeeze dry using your hands or a thin muslin cloth to extract all radish juice.

steps.title: Mix Stuffing
steps.description: Mix the dry radish with ginger, chopped green chilies, ajwain, coriander, and salt.

steps.title: Grill Paratha
steps.description: Stuff inside dough, roll, and cook on hot griddle applying ghee until brown patches form.

title: Besan Chilla
description: Quick savory gram flour pancakes loaded with chopped onions, tomatoes, and spices.

steps.title: Make Batter
steps.description: Whisk besan, water, salt, turmeric, and ajwain in a bowl into a thin, lump-free batter.

steps.title: Add Veggies
steps.description: Stir chopped onions, tomatoes, green chili, and coriander into the batter.

steps.title: Pour & Cook
steps.description: Pour a ladle of batter onto a hot greased tawa. Spread into a circle. Cook with oil on medium flame until edges release, flip, and cook other side.

title: Moong Dal Chilla
description: Healthy and protein-rich breakfast pancakes made with soaked green or yellow moong dal.

steps.title: Blend Dal
steps.description: Blend soaked moong dal with ginger, green chili, and a splash of water into a smooth paste. Stir in salt and hing.

steps.title: Spread
steps.description: Spread a ladle of batter on a hot pan into a thin crepe. Drizzle oil.

steps.title: Stuff & Roll
steps.description: Cook until crisp, sprinkle grated paneer and coriander in the middle, fold, and serve.

faqs.question: Do I need to ferment the batter?
faqs.answer: No, moong dal chilla is an instant recipe and requires zero fermentation.

title: Soft Steamed Idli
description: Fluffy and spongy South Indian steamed rice cakes made from fermented rice-lentil batter.

steps.title: Grease Moulds
steps.description: Grease idli plates with sesame or coconut oil.

steps.title: Pour Batter
steps.description: Gently stir the fermented batter. Spoon it into the greased moulds.

steps.title: Steam
steps.description: Steam in cooker without weight or steamer for 10-12 minutes on medium flame. Let cool slightly, scoop out, and serve.

faqs.question: Why are my idlis hard?
faqs.answer: Hard idlis can be caused by insufficient batter fermentation or incorrect rice-to-dal ratio.

title: Crispy Masala Dosa
description: Thin, crispy fermented rice and lentil crepe stuffed with a dry spiced potato bhaji.

steps.title: Prepare Griddle
steps.description: Heat flat griddle. Splash water to cool it slightly, wipe with a damp cloth.

steps.title: Spread Crepe
steps.description: Pour a ladle of batter in center. Spread in a circular motion to make it thin and even. Drizzle butter.

steps.title: Stuff & Fold
steps.description: Cook on medium flame until edges lift and base turns brown. Place potato bhaji in center, fold into a cylinder, and serve.

title: Punjabi Samosa
description: Crispy fried pastry triangles filled with dry spiced potatoes and green peas.

steps.title: Make Dough
steps.description: Knead maida, ghee, ajwain, salt, and water into a stiff dough. Cover and rest for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Make Stuffing
steps.description: Sauté ginger, spices, potatoes, and peas in oil until dry. Let stuffing cool.

steps.title: Shape & Fry
steps.description: Roll dough, cut into halves. Shape each half into a cone, fill with stuffing, seal the edge with water. Deep fry on low heat until crisp golden.

faqs.question: Why are there bubbles on my samosa skin?
faqs.answer: Frying samosas in oil that is too hot causes bubbles. Always fry on low heat.

title: Khasta Kachori
description: Crispy, flaky fried pastry stuffed with a spiced lentil or moong dal filling.

steps.title: Make Stuffing
steps.description: Sauté coarsely ground moong dal with oil, fennel seeds, coriander powder, cumin, hing, and chili powder until dry.

steps.title: Knead Pastry
steps.description: Knead maida with ghee, salt, and water into a soft dough.

steps.title: Assemble & Fry
steps.description: Stuff pastry dough balls with dal mixture. Flatten slightly with palms. Deep fry slowly on low-medium flame until puffed and golden.

title: Bread Pakora
description: Popular street food made with bread slices stuffed with potato filling, dipped in chickpea batter, and deep fried.

steps.title: Prepare Sandwiches
steps.description: Spread potato masala on a bread slice, cover with another, cut diagonally into two triangles.

steps.title: Make Batter
steps.description: Whisk besan, water, salt, ajwain, and turmeric into a medium-thick batter.

steps.title: Dip & Fry
steps.description: Dip bread triangle in besan batter, coating all sides. Slide into hot oil, deep fry until golden-crisp.

title: Crispy Onion Pakoda
description: Classic Indian tea-time fritters made with sliced onions, gram flour, and green herbs.

steps.title: Macerate Onions
steps.description: Mix sliced onions with salt, let rest for 5 minutes. Onions will release moisture.

steps.title: Add Flours
steps.description: Add besan, rice flour, green chilies, coriander, ginger, and chili powder. Mix with hands without adding water.

steps.title: Fry Fritters
steps.description: Drop small portions of the sticky onion mixture into hot oil. Fry until crispy golden brown.

faqs.question: Do I need water?
faqs.answer: No, onion juice is usually enough to bind the flour, rendering pakodas extra crispy.

title: Aloo Tikki
description: Crispy spiced potato patties served with curd, sweet tamarind chutney, and green herb chutney.

steps.title: Form Patties
steps.description: Mix mashed potatoes, cornflour, salt, green chili, and chaat masala. Shape into round flat discs.

steps.title: Shallow Fry
steps.description: Shallow fry patties on a griddle with oil on medium flame until outer crust is crispy golden.

steps.title: Garnish
steps.description: Serve hot, topped with sweet yogurt, tamarind chutney, mint chutney, and sev.

title: Crispy Veg Cutlet
description: Deep-fried or pan-fried crispy patties containing mashed mixed vegetables coated in breadcrumbs.

steps.title: Form Cutlets
steps.description: Mash veggies with ginger, chilies, spice powder, and 2 tbsp breadcrumbs. Shape into ovals.

steps.title: Coat
steps.description: Dip each patty in thin maida-water slurry, then roll in breadcrumbs to coat completely.

steps.title: Fry
steps.description: Shallow or deep fry in hot oil until outer shell is completely golden and crispy.

title: Veg Spring Roll
description: Crispy fried wrappers stuffed with seasoned stir-fried vegetables and noodles.

steps.title: Stir Fry Stuffing
steps.description: Stir fry cabbage, carrots, bell peppers, soy sauce, and black pepper on high heat for 2 minutes. Let cool.

steps.title: Roll Wrappers
steps.description: Place stuffing on wrapper. Fold sides and roll tightly. Seal the end with a maida-water paste.

steps.title: Deep Fry
steps.description: Deep fry in hot oil until crispy and golden-yellow. Slice diagonally and serve with sweet chili sauce.

title: Veg Steamed Momos
description: Popular Tibetan dumplings stuffed with sautéed finely chopped cabbage and onions, steamed to perfection.

steps.title: Sauté Stuffing
steps.description: Sauté garlic, grated cabbage, carrots, and onions in oil with soy sauce and black pepper. Dry fully.

steps.title: Shape Dumplings
steps.description: Roll small dough circles, thin at edges. Place stuffing in middle, pleat, and seal to form momos.

steps.title: Steam
steps.description: Steam momos in a preheated steamer for 10-12 minutes until dough turns translucent. Serve with red spicy momo chutney.

faqs.question: How do I know momos are cooked?
faqs.answer: The outer dough will become non-sticky and slightly translucent when cooked.

title: Dahi Vada
description: Soft lentil fritters soaked in sweet creamy yogurt and drizzled with dry roasted cumin, red chili, and sweet chutneys.

steps.title: Grind & Fry Vadas
steps.description: Grind urad dal into a thick batter. Whisk vigorously to trap air. Deep fry scoops of batter into round vadas.

steps.title: Soak in Water
steps.description: Drop fried vadas into warm water, let soak for 15 minutes. Squeeze gently between palms to remove water.

steps.title: Serve with Dahi
steps.description: Place vadas in a dish, cover with chilled sweet yogurt, drizzle chutneys, sprinkle cumin powder, black salt, and red chili powder.

title: Mumbai Pav Bhaji
description: Thick vegetable curry (bhaji) cooked with a special spice blend and served with soft butter-toasted buns (pav).

steps.title: Boil & Mash Veggies
steps.description: Pressure cook potatoes, peas, and cauliflower. Mash completely.

steps.title: Prepare Bhaji
steps.description: Sauté onions, capsicum, and tomato. Add Pav Bhaji Masala, mashed veggies, butter, red color (optional), and water. Simmer and mash on a flat tawa for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Toast Pav
steps.description: Slice pav. Toast on griddle with lots of butter, coriander, and a pinch of pav bhaji masala. Serve hot with bhaji, lemon, and onions.

title: Street Style Veg Noodles
description: Stir-fried noodles tossed with cabbage, carrots, bell peppers, soy sauce, and white pepper.

steps.title: Boil Noodles
steps.description: Boil noodles in salted water until al dente. Drain and toss with 1 tsp oil.

steps.title: Stir Fry
steps.description: Stir fry chopped garlic, sliced onions, cabbage, bell peppers on high heat for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Add noodles, soy sauce, green chili sauce, vinegar, black pepper, and salt. Toss on high heat for 2 minutes.

title: Veg Hakka Noodles
description: Chinese-style thin noodles tossed with crunchy sliced vegetables and mild seasoning.

steps.title: Boil Noodles
steps.description: Cook Hakka noodles, drain and cool.

steps.title: Stir Fry
steps.description: Stir fry julienned vegetables in a smoking hot wok with garlic and oil for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Sauce & Toss
steps.description: Add noodles, soy sauce, vinegar, and white pepper. Toss quickly and serve hot.

title: Schezwan Noodles
description: Fiery, spicy stir-fried noodles tossed with red Schezwan sauce, garlic, and crisp veggies.

steps.title: Sauté Aromatics
steps.description: Sauté chopped garlic and spring onion whites in oil on high heat.

steps.title: Add Schezwan Sauce
steps.description: Stir in Schezwan sauce, then toss in bell peppers and cook for 1 minute.

steps.title: Mix Noodles
steps.description: Add boiled noodles, toss vigorously to combine, and top with spring onion greens.

title: Veg Manchurian Gravy
description: Fried vegetable balls tossed in a tangy, sweet, and savory Manchurian sauce made with soy sauce and garlic.

steps.title: Form Manchurian Balls
steps.description: Mix grated vegetables, flour, cornstarch, salt, and pepper. Shape into small balls and deep fry until crispy brown.

steps.title: Make Manchurian Sauce
steps.description: Sauté garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Add onions, soy sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, vinegar, and cornflour-water slurry to thicken.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Add fried veggie balls to the bubbling gravy. Cook for 2 minutes and serve hot with fried rice.

title: Chilli Potato
description: Crispy fried potato fingers tossed in a spicy, sweet, and sour chili sauce.

steps.title: Fry Potatoes
steps.description: Coat potato fingers with dry cornstarch. Deep fry in hot oil until very crispy.

steps.title: Prepare Spicy Base
steps.description: Sauté garlic, ginger, sliced onions, and capsicum. Pour soy sauce, chili sauce, and salt.

steps.title: Toss
steps.description: Toss fried crispy potatoes in the prepared sauce on high heat. Serve immediately.

title: Honey Chilli Potato
description: Sweet and spicy appetizer made with crispy fried potato fingers glazed with honey and sesame seeds.

steps.title: Fry Potatoes
steps.description: Coat potato fingers in cornstarch batter and deep fry until crunchy.

steps.title: Make Honey Sauce
steps.description: Sauté garlic, add chili sauce, soy sauce, and a little water. Turn off heat, then stir in honey.

steps.title: Glaze
steps.description: Toss fried potatoes in the sweet sauce, sprinkle toasted sesame seeds, and serve hot.

faqs.question: Why turn off heat before adding honey?
faqs.answer: Heating honey at high temperatures can degrade its flavor and quality.

title: Classic Veg Fried Rice
description: A simple Indo-Chinese fried rice stir-fried with vegetables, soy sauce, and white pepper powder.

steps.title: Stir Fry Veggies
steps.description: Sauté garlic and spring onions in sesame oil on high heat. Add carrots and beans. Stir fry for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add Rice
steps.description: Add chilled cooked rice, salt, soy sauce, and white pepper.

steps.title: Toss
steps.description: Toss on high heat for 1 minute until fragrant. Garnish with spring onions.

title: Gobi Manchurian
description: Crispy cauliflower florets fried and tossed in a tangy, spicy Manchurian sauce.

steps.title: Fry Gobi
steps.description: Coat gobi florets in cornflour-maida batter. Deep fry until crispy golden.

steps.title: Make Sauce
steps.description: Sauté garlic, ginger, and onions. Add soy sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, vinegar, and a small cornflour slurry to make a glaze.

steps.title: Toss
steps.description: Add fried gobi and toss quickly on high heat so the florets stay crunchy.

title: Crispy Corn
description: Fried sweet corn kernels tossed with onions, green chilies, and tangy chaat spices.

steps.title: Coat Corn
steps.description: Dry boiled sweet corn completely. Coat with cornstarch, rice flour, salt, and pepper.

steps.title: Deep Fry
steps.description: Deep fry corn in hot oil until they turn crispy golden and float. Drain.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Toss fried corn with chopped onions, green chilies, chaat masala, and fresh lemon juice. Serve hot.

faqs.question: Why do corn kernels pop during frying?
faqs.answer: Moisture inside kernels causes them to pop. Ensure corn is well dried and coated.

title: Indo-Chinese Spring Rolls
description: Crispy golden spring rolls stuffed with sautéed cabbage, spring onions, and bean sprouts.

steps.title: Cook Stuffing
steps.description: Sauté garlic and julienned veggies in oil, add soy sauce, vinegar, and pepper. Do not overcook.

steps.title: Fill & Seal
steps.description: Place stuffing in wrappers, roll tight, seal with cornflour paste.

steps.title: Fry Crisp
steps.description: Deep fry until golden brown and super crispy. Serve with chili sauce.

title: Gulab Jamun
description: Classic Indian sweet dumpling made from milk solids (khoya) fried and soaked in cardamom sugar syrup.

steps.title: Make Sugar Syrup
steps.description: Boil sugar, water, and cardamoms together for 5 minutes until sticky but not forming threads. Keep warm.

steps.title: Form Dough Balls
steps.description: Mash khoya and maida into a soft dough without cracks. Shape into smooth small round balls.

steps.title: Fry & Soak
steps.description: Deep fry balls in ghee or oil on very low flame until deep golden-brown. Drain and soak in warm syrup for 2 hours.

faqs.question: Why did my gulab jamuns break during frying?
faqs.answer: If the dough is too dry or has cracks, they will disintegrate. Add a few drops of milk to smooth the dough.

title: Rasmalai
description: Soft paneer discs (chenna) soaked in sweet thickened milk flavored with cardamom, saffron, and pistachios.

steps.title: Make Chenna
steps.description: Curdle boiling milk with lemon juice. Strain in cheesecloth, wash, and squeeze water. Knead chenna until smooth, shape into small flat discs.

steps.title: Boil in Syrup
steps.description: Cook chenna discs in boiling light sugar syrup for 15 minutes. They will double in size.

steps.title: Soak in Rabri
steps.description: Prepare rabri by reducing milk to half with saffron and sugar. Squeeze syrup from chenna discs and transfer into warm rabri. Chill and serve.

title: Bengali Rasgulla
description: Spongy and soft cottage cheese balls boiled in a light sugar syrup.

steps.title: Extract Chenna
steps.description: Curdle boiling milk with lemon juice. Strain and hang chenna in cloth for 45 minutes to drain water.

steps.title: Knead Chenna
steps.description: Knead chenna for 10 minutes until it releases grease. Roll into smooth small balls.

steps.title: Boil in Syrup
steps.description: Boil sugar and water. Add chenna balls, cover tightly, and boil on high flame for 15 minutes. Let cool.

title: Gajar Ka Halwa
description: Traditional Punjabi dessert made with red carrots cooked in milk, sugar, ghee, and khoya.

steps.title: Simmer Carrots
steps.description: Cook grated carrots and milk in a heavy kadhai until all the milk evaporates.

steps.title: Add Sugar & Ghee
steps.description: Add sugar and ghee. Stir constantly and cook for 10 minutes until mixture shines.

steps.title: Garnish
steps.description: Mix in cardamom powder, chopped almonds, and cashews. Serve hot.

faqs.question: Can I use condensed milk?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can substitute milk and sugar with condensed milk for a quicker halwa.

title: Suji Ka Halwa
description: Quick semolina sweet pudding prepared with roasted suji, ghee, sugar, and nuts.

steps.title: Boil Sugar Water
steps.description: Boil water and sugar in a pot until sugar dissolves. Keep hot.

steps.title: Roast Suji
steps.description: Melt ghee in a pan, roast suji on low heat until golden brown and fragrant.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Pour sugar water into roasted suji slowly, stirring continuously to prevent lumps. Cook until thick.

title: Traditional Rice Kheer
description: Creamy cardamom-spiced Indian rice pudding made by slow-cooking basmati rice with full cream milk.

steps.title: Boil Milk & Rice
steps.description: Bring milk to a boil. Add soaked rice, simmer on low heat.

steps.title: Slow Cook
steps.description: Cook for 25 minutes, stirring frequently, until rice is soft and milk becomes creamy.

steps.title: Sweeten & Spice
steps.description: Add sugar, cardamom powder, and saffron. Cook for 5 minutes. Serve warm or cold.

title: Chawal Ki Kheer
description: Rich, delicious, slow-cooked rice pudding served cold and garnished with almonds and pistachios.

steps.title: Boil
steps.description: Boil rice and milk together on low flame.

steps.title: Thicken
steps.description: Stir constantly until rice grains mash easily and milk thickens.

steps.title: Sweeten
steps.description: Add sugar and dry nuts. Mix well and chill before serving.

title: Instant Jalebi
description: Crispy, juicy sweet spirals made of fermented flour batter deep-fried and dipped in sugar syrup.

steps.title: Make Batter
steps.description: Mix maida, yogurt, baking soda, and water into a smooth batter. It should be thick but pourable.

steps.title: Pipe spirals
steps.description: Pour batter in squeeze bottle. Squeeze spirals into flat hot oil/ghee.

steps.title: Soak
steps.description: Fry until crisp on both sides, then slide immediately into warm sugar syrup. Soak for 2 minutes.

title: Lachha Rabri
description: Sweet condensed-milk dish made by boiling milk on low heat until it becomes rich and cream-layered.

steps.title: Gather Malai
steps.description: Bring milk to a boil in a broad pan. Keep collecting the cream (malai) layers to the sides of the pan.

steps.title: Reduce Milk
steps.description: Continue reducing milk on low heat until it reaches 1/3 of its volume.

steps.title: Combine & Sweeten
steps.description: Scrape all cream layers from the sides back into the milk, add sugar and cardamom. Cool and serve.

title: Moong Dal Halwa
description: Rich traditional Rajasthani sweet made of split yellow lentils, ghee, sugar, and cardamoms.

steps.title: Roast ground dal
steps.description: Melt ghee, add coarsely ground moong dal. Sauté on low flame, stirring constantly, until it turns golden-brown.

steps.title: Add Milk & Sugar
steps.description: Pour in hot milk and sugar syrup. Stir constantly to avoid lumps.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.description: Simmer until the ghee separates from the sides of the halwa. Garnish with dry nuts.

faqs.question: Why does it require so much stirring?
faqs.answer: Moong dal tends to stick to the pan easily, so continuous stirring on low heat is essential.

title: Mango Shake
description: Thick, creamy, and sweet mango milkshake blended with ripe mango pulp and chilled milk.

steps.title: Blend Mango
steps.description: Blend mango pulp and sugar into a smooth paste.

steps.title: Add Milk
steps.description: Add chilled milk and ice cubes, blend again for 1 minute until smooth.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Pour into glasses, garnish with chopped nuts and mango chunks.

title: Banana Milkshake
description: Creamy and energizing milkshake blended with ripe bananas, chilled milk, and honey.

steps.title: Blend Bananas
steps.description: Slice bananas and blend with honey and half cup of milk until smooth.

steps.title: Blend Shake
steps.description: Add remaining milk and blend for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Pour
steps.description: Pour into glasses, top with a pinch of cardamom powder or cinnamon.

title: Cafe Style Cold Coffee
description: Rich, creamy, and chocolaty cold coffee blended to frothy perfection.

steps.title: Dissolve Coffee
steps.description: Dissolve coffee and sugar in 2 tbsp warm water.

steps.title: Blend
steps.description: Add coffee mixture, chilled milk, and ice cubes to a blender. Blend on high speed for 1 minute until frothy.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Pour into chocolate-drizzled glasses, spoon foam on top.

title: Sweet Punjabi Lassi
description: Thick and creamy traditional Punjabi yogurt-based cold beverage flavored with cardamom and saffron.

steps.title: Churn Curd
steps.description: In a pitcher, whisk or churn curd, sugar, and cardamoms with ice cubes until thick and frothy.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Pour into clay glasses, top with a spoonful of thick malai and chopped pistachios.

title: Honey Lemon Green Tea
description: Healthy and relaxing hot drink made with green tea leaves, lemon juice, and honey.

steps.title: Boil Water
steps.description: Heat water until hot but not boiling (around 80°C).

steps.title: Steep Tea
steps.description: Pour water over green tea bag/leaves. Steep for 2-3 minutes. Remove bag.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Stir in honey and a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.

faqs.question: Why not use boiling water?
faqs.answer: Boiling water makes green tea leaves taste bitter.

title: Fresh Lemon Juice (Shikanji)
description: Cooling summer lemonade seasoned with black salt, sugar, and roasted cumin powder.

steps.title: Mix Sweetener
steps.description: Dissolve sugar in lemon juice and water.

steps.title: Add Spices
steps.description: Stir in black salt, roasted cumin powder, and torn mint leaves.

steps.title: Chill
steps.description: Add ice cubes and serve chilled.

title: Fresh Watermelon Juice
description: 100% natural, refreshing cold watermelon juice blended with a touch of mint.

steps.title: Blend Fruit
steps.description: Blend watermelon chunks and mint leaves until liquefied.

steps.title: Strain
steps.description: Strain through a sieve to remove pulp if desired.

steps.title: Serve Chilled
steps.description: Pour into glasses over ice, squeeze in a little lime juice.

title: Kesar Badam Milk
description: Chilled sweet milk drink enriched with almond paste, cardamoms, and saffron threads.

steps.title: Almond Paste
steps.description: Grind soaked almonds with a splash of milk into a smooth paste.

steps.title: Boil Milk
steps.description: Boil milk with sugar, saffron, and cardamoms. Add almond paste.

steps.title: Simmer & Cool
steps.description: Simmer on low heat for 10 minutes until slightly thickened. Cool and chill before serving.

title: Rich Hot Chocolate
description: Thick, decadent, and creamy hot chocolate made with pure cocoa and chopped dark chocolate.

steps.title: Whisk Cocoa
steps.description: In a saucepan, whisk milk, cocoa powder, and sugar together until no lumps remain.

steps.title: Melt Chocolate
steps.description: Heat on medium flame until hot but not boiling. Add chopped dark chocolate, stirring constantly until melted.

steps.title: Thicken
steps.description: Simmer gently for 2 minutes until rich and thick. Serve hot topped with marshmallows or whipped cream.

title: Masala Chai
description: A classic Indian spiced tea brewed with fresh ginger, cardamom, and strong tea leaves for a comforting warm hug.

steps.title: Boil Water with Spices
steps.description: Crush ginger and cardamom. Add them to a saucepan with water and bring to a boil. Let it simmer for 2 minutes to extract flavors.

steps.title: Brew Tea
steps.description: Add black tea leaves to the boiling spiced water and simmer for 1-2 minutes until the color is dark.

steps.title: Add Milk
steps.description: Pour in the milk and add sugar. Bring to a boil again, lower the heat, and simmer for another 2-3 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Strain the hot tea into cups and enjoy.

title: South Indian Filter Coffee
description: Authentic rich and frothy South Indian coffee made using a traditional metal filter and strong coffee decoction.

steps.title: Prepare Decoction
steps.description: Add the coffee powder to the upper compartment of the filter and press lightly. Pour boiling water over it and cover. Let it drip into the lower compartment for 10-15 minutes.

steps.title: Boil Milk
steps.description: In a saucepan, bring the full-fat milk to a boil.

steps.title: Mix
steps.description: Add sugar to your serving cup (dabarah and tumbler). Pour 2-3 tablespoons of the strong coffee decoction, then fill with the boiling hot milk.

steps.title: Froth
steps.description: Pour the coffee back and forth between the dabarah and tumbler a few times to dissolve the sugar and create a thick frothy layer on top. Serve hot.

title: Amritsari Chole Bhature
description: Classic Punjabi style spicy chickpea curry (Chole) served with fluffy, deep-fried leavened bread (Bhature).

steps.title: Soak & Boil Chana
steps.description: Soak chickpeas overnight. Pressure cook with tea bags, salt, and water for 5-6 whistles until soft.

steps.title: Make Bhature Dough
steps.description: Mix maida, yogurt, a pinch of baking soda, salt, and water. Knead into a smooth dough, cover with a damp cloth, and rest for 2 hours.

steps.title: Cook Chole Gravy
steps.description: Sauté chopped onions, ginger-garlic paste, and tomato puree. Add Chole Masala, red chili powder, and cook until oil separates. Stir in the boiled chickpeas with their water and simmer for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Fry Bhature
steps.description: Divide bhature dough into balls, roll into ovals. Deep fry in smoking hot oil until puffed and golden brown on both sides. Serve hot with spicy chole, pickles, and onions.

title: Royal Kashmiri Pulao
description: A premium, mild, sweet, and aromatic Kashmiri rice dish loaded with dried fruits, nuts, fresh fruits like pomegranate, and saffron-infused milk.

steps.title: Prepare Saffron Milk & Toast Nuts
steps.description: Soak saffron in warm milk. Fry the mixed nuts and raisins in ghee until golden-brown and set aside.

steps.title: Sauté Rice
steps.description: In a pot, heat ghee and add cardamom, cinnamon, and cloves. Add soaked Basmati rice and sauté gently for 1 minute.

steps.title: Cook Rice
steps.description: Add 2 cups of water, saffron milk, and salt. Bring to a boil, cover, and cook on low heat for 12 minutes until fluffy.

steps.title: Garnish & Serve
steps.description: Gently fold in the fried nuts, raisins, fresh apple chunks, and pomegranate seeds before serving warm.

title: Khaman Dhokla
description: Soft, spongy, and juicy steamed gram flour cakes topped with a sweet and tangy tempering of mustard seeds, green chilies, and curry leaves.

steps.title: Prepare Batter
steps.description: Whisk besan, water, lemon juice, turmeric, salt, and 1 tbsp sugar into a smooth batter.

steps.title: Steam
steps.description: Grease dhokla plate. Stir Eno fruit salt into the batter until frothy. Pour into plate and steam immediately on high heat for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Make Tempering
steps.description: Heat 1 tbsp oil, splutter mustard seeds, green chilies, and curry leaves. Add 1/2 cup of water and 1 tbsp sugar, bring to a boil.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Cut cooled dhokla into squares. Pour the hot tempering liquid evenly over them. Garnish with chopped coriander and grated coconut.

title: Mumbai Sev Puri
description: Popular Mumbai street food made of flat-toasted puris loaded with potatoes, onions, three signature chutneys (sweet, spicy, garlic), and topped with fine sev.

steps.title: Arrange Puris
steps.description: Arrange 12 flat papdi/puris in a single layer on a serving plate.

steps.title: Layer Potatoes & Onions
steps.description: Place a spoonful of mashed potatoes on each puri, then sprinkle chopped onions over them.

steps.title: Add Chutneys
steps.description: Drizzle tamarind chutney, spicy green chutney, and garlic chutney over each puri.

steps.title: Top with Sev
steps.description: Generously cover the puris with fine sev. Sprinkle chaat masala, red chili powder, lime juice, and chopped coriander. Serve immediately.

title: Premium Kaju Katli
description: Classic royal Indian sweet made of premium cashew powder and sugar syrup, rolled into smooth thin fudge, and sliced into diamond shapes.

steps.title: Grind Cashews
steps.description: Grind cashews to a fine powder in a mixer. Pulse to avoid oil release, then sieve to remove chunks.

steps.title: Boil Syrup
steps.description: In a non-stick pan, boil sugar and water until sugar is completely dissolved.

steps.title: Cook Cashew Paste
steps.description: Add cashew powder and cook on low heat, stirring continuously, for 8-10 minutes until it forms a smooth non-sticky dough.

steps.title: Roll & Cut
steps.description: Transfer dough onto greased butter paper. Knead slightly while warm, place another sheet on top, and roll thin. Cut into diamond shapes and cool.

title: Schezwan Fried Rice
description: Fiery and flavor-packed Indo-Chinese fried rice stir-fried with colorful vegetables, garlic, and bold Schezwan sauce.

steps.title: Sauté Aromatics
steps.description: Sauté chopped garlic, ginger, and spring onion whites in oil on high heat.

steps.title: Stir Fry Veggies
steps.description: Add chopped vegetables and stir fry on high flame for 2 minutes to keep them crunchy.

steps.title: Season & Mix
steps.description: Stir in Schezwan sauce, soy sauce, vinegar, and salt. Add chilled rice, toss vigorously for 2 minutes, garnish with spring onion greens, and serve hot.
